name: Ginger Beer No. 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Bruise the ginger lightly; avoid bruising it too much as this will make the drink cloudy.
2. Pour the ginger into a large container and add 10 bottles of cold water.
3. Add the rind and juice from a fresh green lemon to the mixture.
4. Cover the container and leave it overnight.
5. The next day, strain the mixture through a fine sieve or cheesecloth.
6. Sweeten the strained liquid with 4 pounds of clear sugar until it reaches your desired level of sweetness.
7. Bottle the ginger beer, adding a few grains of barley to each bottle to encourage fermentation.
8. Allow the barley to cause the drink to ferment for at least a few days before consuming.
